metadata.purpose: About Contact360 page displaying company information, mission, values, and story. We're on a mission to democratize B2B data accuracy.

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: Activity tracking page displaying user activities with filtering, statistics, and detailed activity information.

uses_endpoints.description: Get user activities with filtering and pagination. Batched with activity stats in useActivitiesPage hook.
Get activity statistics (total, by service type, by action type, by status). Batched with activities in useActivitiesPage hook.

metadata.purpose: AI chat assistant page for interacting with AI models, managing chat history, and sending messages. Pro users only.

uses_endpoints.description: List all AI chats with optional filters (search, date range, etc.)
Get a specific AI chat with all messages
Create a new AI chat
Update an AI chat (e.g., title, metadata)
Delete an AI chat
Send a message to the AI chat and receive response

metadata.purpose: Analytics page displaying performance metrics, system analytics, and performance charts with date range filtering.

uses_endpoints.description: Get performance metrics with date range filtering. Returns metrics summary and time series data.
Get aggregated metrics summary
Submit a performance metric (typically called automatically by performance monitor)

metadata.purpose: Contact360 API documentation page displaying API endpoints, authentication, usage examples, and integration guides. Integrate our verified data directly into your application.

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: Billing cancel page displayed when payment is cancelled. Shows cancellation message and redirects to billing page.
Billing and subscription management page with current subscription, plans, addons, payment methods, invoices, and admin billing management.

uses_endpoints.description: Get current user billing information. Batched with plans, addons, and invoices in useBillingPage hook.
Get available subscription plans. Batched with billing info, addons, and invoices in useBillingPage hook.
Get available addon packages. Batched with billing info, plans, and invoices in useBillingPage hook.
Get user invoices with pagination. Batched with billing info, plans, and addons in useBillingPage hook.
Subscribe to a subscription plan
Purchase an addon package
Cancel current subscription
Get all plans including inactive ones (admin only)
Get all addons including inactive ones (admin only)

metadata.purpose: Careers page displaying job openings and company culture information. Help us build the future of B2B intelligence.

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: Chrome extension information page displaying features, installation instructions, and benefits. Find emails on LinkedIn and company websites with one click.

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: Company listing and management page with filtering, search, bulk operations, pagination, and AI-powered company summaries.

uses_endpoints.description: Query companies with VQL filtering, pagination, and sorting. Batched with filter definitions in useCompaniesPage hook.
Get available filter definitions for companies. Batched with company data in useCompaniesPage hook.
Get single company details for AI summary generation
Create a CSV export of selected companies

metadata.purpose: Contact listing and management page with advanced filtering, search, VQL query builder, saved searches, bulk operations, and pagination.

uses_endpoints.description: Query contacts with VQL filtering, pagination, and sorting. Batched with count and saved searches in useContactsPage hook.
Get total contact count with filters applied. Batched with contact data in useContactsPage hook.
List saved searches for contacts. Batched with contact data in useContactsPage hook.
Create a new saved search for contacts
Update an existing saved search
Delete a saved search
Create a CSV export of selected contacts

metadata.purpose: Main dashboard page displaying user statistics, recent activities, pending exports, performance charts, and quick actions.

uses_endpoints.description: Get user statistics (total users, active users, users by role/plan). Only included if user is admin/superAdmin. Batched with activities and exports in useDashboardPage hook.
Get recent user activities with limit. Batched with stats and exports in useDashboardPage hook.
List pending and processing exports. Filtered by status. Batched with stats and activities in useDashboardPage hook.

metadata.purpose: Dynamic dashboard page displaying custom dashboard pages configured by admins. Supports custom sections and layouts.

uses_endpoints.description: Get custom dashboard page by pageId with sections, metadata, and access control

metadata.purpose: Export management page for viewing, downloading, canceling, and deleting export jobs. Includes S3 file browser for super admins.

uses_endpoints.description: List all exports with pagination and optional status filter. Auto-refreshes every 3 seconds for pending/processing exports.
Get details of a specific export
Cancel a pending or processing export

metadata.purpose: Email Finder tool page for finding verified email addresses using first name, last name, and company domain. Main application dashboard with sidebar navigation.

uses_endpoints.description: Get a single email address for a contact using first name, last name, and company domain. Main API call for Email Finder functionality.
Verify and find the first valid email with verification. Alternative endpoint for enhanced email finding.

uses_endpoints.description: Search LinkedIn profiles and extract contact data
Extract and upsert contact data from LinkedIn URLs
Export LinkedIn extracted data

metadata.purpose: User login page with email/password authentication. Welcome back page to sign in to access verified data.

uses_endpoints.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns access token and refresh token.
Get current session information after login

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: User profile management page with tabs for profile editing, team management, AI settings, appearance, notifications, security, API keys, and billing.

uses_endpoints.description: Get current user profile information. Batched with API keys, sessions, team, and 2FA status in useProfilePage hook.
List user API keys. Batched with profile, sessions, team, and 2FA in useProfilePage hook.
List active user sessions. Batched with profile, API keys, team, and 2FA in useProfilePage hook.
List team members (admin only). Batched with profile, API keys, sessions, and 2FA in useProfilePage hook.
Get 2FA status for current user. Batched with profile, API keys, sessions, and team in useProfilePage hook.
Create a new API key
Delete an API key
Revoke a specific session
Setup 2FA for user account
Verify 2FA code
Disable 2FA for user account
Update current user's profile (jobTitle, bio, timezone, notifications)
Upload avatar image for current user (supports base64, URL, or file path)

metadata.purpose: User registration page for creating new accounts. Get 50 free credits every month.

uses_endpoints.description: Register a new user account. Returns access token and refresh token.

metadata.purpose: Root page that redirects authenticated users to dashboard and unauthenticated users to login.
metadata.authentication: Not required (redirects based on auth status)

metadata.purpose: Settings page that redirects to profile page. Legacy route for backward compatibility.
Terms of service page displaying terms and conditions, user agreements, and service usage policies.

uses_endpoints.description: Get marketing page content dynamically. Falls back to static content if API fails.

metadata.purpose: UI showcase page displaying component library, interactive demos, and code examples for all reusable components.
Usage and limits page displaying feature usage statistics and remaining limits across all features in cards or table view.

uses_endpoints.description: Get usage information for all features or a specific feature. Returns used, limit, remaining, and resetAt for each feature.

metadata.purpose: Email verifier page with bulk verification, single email verification, management, and history tabs.

uses_endpoints.description: Verify a single email address for validity and risk
Verify multiple email addresses in bulk
Get verification activity history

metadata.purpose: Documentation listing page displaying available documentation pages in a grid or list view with search and filtering capabilities.
Individual documentation page displaying markdown content with navigation sidebar, table of contents, and related documentation links.
SuperAdmin-only admin console for user management and platform statistics. Shows total/active users and allows viewing and deleting users.
metadata.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)
metadata.authorization: SuperAdmin only; non-SuperAdmin users are redirected to /dashboard

fallback_data.purpose: SuperAdmin control panel to inspect user stats (total/active) and manage users (view, delete). Non-SuperAdmin users see an access denied message or are redirected.
fallback_data.authentication: Required; SuperAdmin role enforced client-side and via guards.

metadata.purpose: Email Finder and Verifier page with Finder | Verifier tabs. Finder: single and bulk email search by name/domain. Verifier: single and bulk email verification with risk analysis.

uses_endpoints.description: Find single email by first name, last name, domain. Used in Finder single search.
Bulk email finder for up to 50 contacts. Used in Finder bulk upload.
Verify a single email address for validity and risk.
Verify multiple email addresses in bulk (up to 1000).
AI-powered email risk analysis (Gemini).
Get finder/verifier activity history.

fallback_data.purpose: Email Finder and Verifier page with Finder | Verifier tabs. Finder: single and bulk email search by name/domain. Verifier: single and bulk email verification with risk analysis.

metadata.purpose: Cloud storage and dataset management page for S3-backed files. Supports browsing S3 tree, previewing CSV datasets, viewing schema and stats, and creating exports/import jobs from existing files.
metadata.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)

fallback_data.purpose: Manage and inspect S3-backed data files, including CSV uploads, schema previews, statistics, and creation of export/import jobs.
fallback_data.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)

metadata.purpose: Background jobs dashboard showing export/import and enrichment jobs. Includes cards/table views, filters, pagination, retry, download, and new export creation.
metadata.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)

fallback_data.purpose: Monitor and manage Contact360 background jobs including exports, imports, and enrichment runs. Provides filters, retry, download, and new export workflows.
fallback_data.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)

metadata.purpose: Experimental live voice interaction page (Voice Link Alpha) that simulates low-latency multimodal interactions and neural transcription.
metadata.authentication: Required (protected by useSessionGuard and DashboardAccessGate in the dashboard layout)

fallback_data.purpose: Prototype interface for live voice interactions (Voice Link Alpha) demonstrating microphone control, status, and a mock transcription timeline.
